phrases.intent_en: Ask where the home goods section is
phrases.cultural_note: Merci is known for its curated home goods, fashion, and lifestyle items.

responses.english: It is on the first floor, up the stairs.
responses.phonetic: seh toh pruh-MYAY ay-TAHZH, ahn mohn-TAHN les-kah-lee-YAY
responses.local: C'est au premier étage, en montant l'escalier.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the café inside the store is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le café à l'intérieur du magasin ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh kah-FAY ah lan-tay-RYUR doo mah-gah-ZEHN
phrases.cultural_note: Merci has three distinct café spaces: a ground-floor café with a bookshop feel, a basement bistro serving simple French lunches, and a salad bar. The basement Used Book Café is especially popular and filled with second-hand books for sale. All three are open to non-shoppers.

responses.english: The café is at the back of the store, in the basement.
responses.phonetic: luh kah-FAY eh toh fohn doo mah-gah-ZAN, oh soo-sol
responses.local: Le café est au fond du magasin, au sous-sol.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if a specific item can be gift-wrapped
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que vous pouvez faire un emballage cadeau pour cet article ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kuh voo poo-VAY fehr uhn ahm-bah-LAHZH kah-DOH poor seh tar-TEEKL
phrases.cultural_note: Merci's gift wrapping uses its signature brown paper and red ribbon — minimal and chic. The store stocks an eclectic mix of fashion, design objects, stationery, home goods, and books. Each floor has a different curator-like feel, and the selection rotates frequently.

responses.english: Yes, we can gift wrap. Ask at the counter.
responses.phonetic: wee, ohn puh fehr uhn pah-KAY kah-DOH. duh-mahn-DAY oh kohn-TWAHR
responses.local: Oui, on peut faire un paquet cadeau. Demandez au comptoir.

phrases.intent_en: Ask a staff member for a gift recommendation under a budget
phrases.text_local: Je cherche un cadeau original pour environ cinquante euros — qu'est-ce que vous me conseilleriez ?
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh shehrsh uhn kah-DOH oh-ree-zhee-NAL poor ahn-vee-ROHN sahn-KAHNT uh-ROH — kess kuh voo muh kohn-seh-yuh-RYAY
phrases.cultural_note: Staff at Merci are knowledgeable and enjoy making tailored recommendations — the store's ethos is personal and considered rather than mass-market. The stationery, candles, and design objects sections are good for gifts in the €30-80 range.

responses.english: I recommend our candles, they are under thirty euros.
responses.phonetic: zhuh voo kohn-SAY noh boo-ZHEE, el sohn tah mwahn duh trahnt uh-ROH
responses.local: Je vous conseille nos bougies, elles sont à moins de trente euros.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the opening hours are
phrases.cultural_note: Merci is closed on Sundays. Check hours before visiting on public holidays.

responses.english: We are open from ten to seven.
responses.phonetic: ohn eh oo-VEHR duh deez uhr ah dee-NUHF uhr
responses.local: On est ouvert de dix heures à dix-neuf heures.
